violations.text: The hand-washing sinks in the kitchens and toilet rooms were lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2024
Working containers (spray bottles) used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2024

The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2024
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2024
The wall and wood frame of the pass-thru area is in poor repair, with peeling paint. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024
